description_long: This object is a loaf of bread that has been sliced into several even pieces, revealing a soft, airy interior with a slightly dense crumb. The crust is golden brown and appears to be moderately thick, with a glossy finish and scattered inclusions of what look like candied fruit or nuts, giving it a festive appearance. The slices are arranged in a slightly fanned-out manner, showing both the crusty exterior and the pale, porous interior. The bread's surface is uneven, with some visible cracks and a rustic, homemade look. The inclusions are distributed throughout the loaf, adding pops of color and texture. There is no visible packaging, branding, or labeling on the bread.
description: A sliced loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and colorful inclusions, revealing a soft, airy interior. The slices are fanned out, showing both the crust and crumb.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the sliced loaf, highlighting the soft, pale interior and the even thickness of the slices.
description_view_1: This angle displays the loaf from the side, emphasizing the colorful inclusions and the alignment of the slices.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the crusty exterior and the back slice, with the inclusions more visible on the surface.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the loaf from a rear-side angle, with the crust and the distribution of inclusions along the top and sides.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is golden brown with a glossy, slightly uneven surface and scattered inclusions of candied fruit. There are no visible flour dustings or scoring marks, giving it a rustic, homemade appearance.
